column5: zhēn qíng xiàng cǎo yuán guǎng kuò
column6: True love is as vast as the grassland
column7: 真 (true) 情 (feeling) 像 (like) 草 (grass) 原 (plain) 广 (wide) 阔 (broad)

column5: céng céng fēng yǔ bù néng zǔ gé
column6: Layer upon layer of wind and rain cannot block it
column7: 层 (layer) 风 (wind) 雨 (rain) 不 (no) 能 (can) 阻 (hinder) 隔 (separate)

column5: zǒng yǒu yún kāi rì chū shí hòu
column6: There always comes a time when the clouds part and the sun rises
column7: 总 (always) 有 (have) 云 (cloud) 开 (open) 日 (sun) 出 (out) 时 (time) 候 (wait)

column5: wàn zhàng yáng guāng zhào yào nǐ wǒ
column6: Ten-thousand-zhang sunlight shines on you and me
column7: 万 (ten thousand) 丈 (ten feet) 阳 (sun) 光 (light) 照 (shine) 耀 (brilliant) 你 (you) 我 (i)

column5: zhēn qíng xiàng méi huā kāi guò
column6: True love is like plum blossoms that once bloomed
column7: 真 (true) 情 (feeling) 像 (like) 梅 (plum) 花 (flower) 开 (open) 过 (past-particle)

column5: lěng lěng bīng xuě bù néng yǎn méi
column6: The coldest ice and snow cannot bury it
column7: 冷 (cold) 冰 (ice) 雪 (snow) 不 (no) 能 (can) 掩 (cover up) 没 (not)

column5: jiù zài zuì lěng zhī tóu zhàn fàng
column6: On the very coldest branch it bursts into bloom
column7: 就 (just) 在 (at) 最 (most) 冷 (cold) 枝 (branch) 头 (head) 绽 (burst open) 放 (release)

column5: kàn jiàn chūn tiān zǒu xiàng nǐ wǒ
column6: Seeing spring walking toward you and me
column7: 看 (see) 见 (see) 春 (spring) 天 (sky) 走 (walk) 向 (toward) 你 (you) 我 (i)

column5: xuě huā piāo piāo běi fēng xiào xiào
column6: Snowflakes drift, the north wind howls
column7: 雪 (snow) 花 (flower) 飘 (float) 北 (north) 风 (wind) 啸 (howl)

column5: tiān dì yī piàn cāng máng
column6: Heaven and earth — a single vast expanse
column7: 天 (sky) 地 (earth) 一 (one) 片 (stretch) 苍 (dark blue) 茫 (vast)

column5: yī jiǎn hán méi ào lì xuě zhōng
column6: A single sprig of cold plum stands proud in the snow
column7: 一 (one) 剪 (cut) 寒 (cold) 梅 (plum) 傲 (proud) 立 (stand) 雪 (snow) 中 (middle)

column5: zhǐ wèi yī rén piāo xiāng
column6: Only for that beloved one does it spread its fragrance
column7: 只 (only) 为 (for) 伊 (that) 人 (person) 飘 (float) 香 (fragrant)

column5: ài wǒ suǒ ài wú yuàn wú huǐ
column6: I love what I love, with no complaint, no regret
column7: 爱 (love) 我 (i) 所 (place) 无 (without) 怨 (blame) 悔 (regret)

column5: cǐ qíng zhǎng liú xīn jiān
column6: This feeling will linger in the heart forever
column7: 此 (this) 情 (feeling) 长 (long) 留 (stay) 心 (heart) 间 (between)
